meta.title: Advanced Grammar: Aspectual & Modal Nuances
meta.title_ko: 고급 문법: 상적 및 양상적 뉘앙스
meta.description: Master subtle distinctions in aspect, tense, and modal usage at C1 level.
meta.description_ko: C1 수준에서 상, 시제, 양상 사용의 미묘한 차이를 학습합니다.

explanation.en: 'Would' for past habits: ONLY repeated actions, NOT states. 'Be' is a state verb.
explanation.ko: 과거 습관의 'would': 반복적 행동에만, 상태에는 불가. 'be'는 상태 동사.

questions.prompt: 'She used to be a doctor' vs 'She would be a doctor every Halloween' — 두 번째 문장이 틀린 이유는?
choices: 'would'는 상태 동사와 함께 쓸 수 없다
'would'는 반복적 행동에만 쓰고 상태에는 못 쓰므로 'be'(상태)에는 부적절

explanation.en: Past perfect continuous: ongoing loss of consciousness up to the arrival.
explanation.ko: 과거 완료 진행형: 도착 시점까지 지속된 의식 상실.

questions.prompt: By the time the ambulance arrived, the patient _____ consciousness for ten minutes.

explanation.en: 'Seem to have been + verb-ing' = perfect continuous infinitive for inferred ongoing past action.
explanation.ko: 'seem to have been + 동사-ing' = 추론된 지속적 과거 행동에 대한 완료 진행 부정사.

questions.prompt: 'She seems to have been working here for years.' — 'to have been working'의 정확한 의미는?

explanation.en: 'Is understood to have been underway' = passive reporting + perfect continuous infinitive.
explanation.ko: 'is understood to have been underway' = 수동 보고 + 완료 진행 부정사.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: The project is understood to have been underway for several years before the funding was withdrawn.

explanation.en: 'Can't have + pp' = logical impossibility about the past. 'Mustn't have' is not standard.
explanation.ko: 'can't have + pp' = 과거에 대한 논리적 불가능. 'mustn't have'는 표준이 아님.

questions.prompt: 'I can't have left my keys at the office.' vs 'I mustn't have left my keys at the office.' — 어느 것이 올바른 표현인가요?
choices: I can't have left (논리적 불가능 추론)

explanation.en: 'Appears to be' = present inference using simple (not continuous) infinitive for a state.
explanation.ko: 'appears to be' = 상태에 대한 현재 추론, 단순(진행이 아닌) 부정사 사용.

questions.prompt: The phenomenon _____ to be more widespread than initially assumed.

explanation.en: Future perfect: completed by 9pm. Future continuous: in progress at 9pm.
explanation.ko: 미래 완료: 9pm까지 완료. 미래 진행: 9pm에 진행 중.

questions.prompt: 'Will have done' vs 'will be doing' at 9pm tonight — 차이는?
choices: will have done = 9pm 이전 완료 예상, will be doing = 9pm에 진행 중 예상
will have done = 현재 완료, will be doing = 현재 진행

questions.prompt: She _____ to have resigned in protest, though the official reason cited was personal.

explanation.en: 'Is said to have + past participle' = passive reporting of a past action.
explanation.ko: 'is said to have + 과거분사' = 과거 행동에 대한 수동 보고.

questions.prompt: She _____ to have resigned in protest, though the official reason cited was personal.

explanation.en: Future perfect continuous emphasises the duration of an ongoing action up to a future point.
explanation.ko: 미래 완료 진행형은 미래 시점까지의 지속적 행동의 기간을 강조합니다.

questions.prompt: 'This time next year I'll have been living here for a decade.' — 이 시제가 나타내는 것은?
choices: 내년 이맘때를 기준으로 10년째 살고 있을 것이다 (기간 강조)

explanation.en: Past perfect continuous: ongoing deliberation preceding the past moment of agreement.
explanation.ko: 과거 완료 진행형: 과거 합의 시점에 선행하는 지속적 심의.

questions.prompt: The delegates _____ for three hours before a consensus was finally reached.

explanation.en: 'Might well' = there is a good chance; stronger than plain 'might'.
explanation.ko: 'might well' = 상당한 가능성이 있음; 단순 'might'보다 강함.

questions.prompt: 'might well' vs 'might' — 차이는?

explanation.en: 'Is believed to have been + gerund' = passive reporting + perfect continuous infinitive.
explanation.ko: 'is believed to have been + 동명사' = 수동 보고 + 완료 진행 부정사.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: The committee is believed to have been considering the proposal for several months.

explanation.en: 'Would have thought' = speculative modal perfect for expectation about the past.
explanation.ko: 'would have thought' = 과거에 대한 기대에 관한 추측 양상 완료.

questions.prompt: I would _____ thought she'd have applied for the position, given her qualifications.

explanation.en: 'Is to + infinitive' = formal obligation or scheduled arrangement; often in official contexts.
explanation.ko: 'is to + 부정사' = 격식체 의무나 예정된 약속; 공식 맥락에서 자주 사용.

questions.prompt: 'The report is to be submitted by Friday.' — 'is to + infinitive'의 의미는?
choices: 공식적 의무나 예정 — 공식 문서나 지시에 자주 쓰임

explanation.en: 'Could not have predicted' = past impossibility; it was not possible to foresee.
explanation.ko: 'could not have predicted' = 과거 불가능; 예측하는 것이 불가능했다.

questions.prompt: They _____ have predicted such a dramatic reversal in public opinion.

explanation.en: 'To have + past participle' in passive reporting = action occurred before the reporting time.
explanation.ko: 수동 보고에서 'to have + 과거분사' = 보고 시점 이전에 발생한 행동.

questions.prompt: 'The negotiations were said to have broken down.' — 'to have broken down'의 시제적 의미는?

explanation.en: 'Rarely + will' = inversion after negative adverb (future).
explanation.ko: 'Rarely + will' = 부정 부사 뒤 도치 (미래).

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: Rarely will you find such an elegant solution to such a complex problem.

explanation.en: 'Seem' is a stative verb: use simple (not continuous) form: 'seems to be'.
explanation.ko: 'seem'은 상태 동사: 단순형(진행이 아닌)을 사용: 'seems to be'.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'The phenomenon is seeming to be more common than previously thought.'

explanation.en: 'Appear to have been + past participle' = present inference about a past passive event.
explanation.ko: 'appear to have been + 과거분사' = 과거 수동 사건에 대한 현재 추론.

questions.prompt: The experiment results _____ to have been falsified, according to the inquiry.

explanation.en: 'Should have performed better' = criticism/regret about past performance.
explanation.ko: 'should have performed better' = 과거 성과에 대한 비판/후회.

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: Why didn't she get the promotion? B: She _____ performed better in the interview — she seemed underprepared.'

explanation.en: Advanced aspectual and modal-perfect combinations.
explanation.ko: 고급 상적 및 양상-완료 조합.

questions.prompt: 복잡한 시제/상 구조와 의미를 연결하세요.
pairs: 과거 행동에 대한 현재 수동 추론
과거 가정의 결과로서 진행 중이었을 행동
과거부터 지속된 과정에 대한 현재 추론
